nasb.text: And all the angels were standing around the throne and around the elders and the four living creatures; and they fell on their faces before the throne and worshiped God,

esv.text: And all the angels were standing around the throne and around the elders and the four living creatures, and they fell on their faces before the throne and worshiped God,

cnv.text: 所有的天使都站在寶座、眾長老和四個活物的四周。他們在寶座前，面伏在地上敬拜　神，

ccb.text: 众天使都站在宝座、众长老和四个活物的周围，在宝座前俯伏敬拜上帝，说：

csbs.text: 所有的天使都站在宝座、长老们和四个活物的周围；他们在宝座前，把脸伏在地上，敬拜神，
